completion_summary: Implemented a candidate independent reference-regret protocol and executable evaluator for the provisional core-4 grid: 20 confirmatory seeds x objective/task-primary metrics = 160 required reference cells per source, with complete per-method coverage, semantic protocol hashes, score/replay schema bindings, trajectory-digest disjointness, reference-builder/method identity separation, per-cell uncertainty, deterministic paired-seed bootstrap intervals, and signed regret that preserves methods exceeding the best-known estimate. Added 11 fail-closed adversarial probes covering oracle mislabeling, missing/duplicate/nonfinite/invalid reference evidence, trajectory and identity contamination, replay mismatch, incomplete/duplicate method evidence, and negative-regret preservation. The control report is deterministic and explicitly keeps parent_task_complete, formal_results_present, benchmark_claim_allowed, and publication_ready false. Validation: 21 related reference-regret, score-replay, layered-evaluation, and confirmatory-freeze tests passed; 5 reference-regret tests passed again after merging current main; Ruff, mypy, claim check, diff check, and repeat report SHA-256 comparison passed. One existing pytest-cache permission warning remains. Reference evidence: no external repository used; dependencies are digest-bound to completed score-replay and confirmatory-freeze reports/claims. Known limitations: the independent reference portfolio, formal method trajectories, formal regret estimates, and independent reproduction have not been run; the parent benchmark-vnext-reference-regret task remains open. Implementation commit cac6525c2e13d63496dd90ad7b186e4e151bbf21; integration commit bf60e76553af3c633309f195b76e46ffca8debaa.
notes: Control-layer slice of benchmark-vnext-reference-regret. Adds only new paths and does not overlap the active RL substrate, runner, task/world/scoring contracts, frozen v0.1 evidence, or release artifacts. No external reference repository is required.
scope: Define and audit an independent candidate reference-regret protocol with per-task/seed coverage, uncertainty, provenance, score-replay binding, non-oracle semantics, and fail-closed contamination checks without running or claiming the formal method matrix
